case_title: WESTON, HOWARD L. VS WONG, JASON G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,891.33 FILED BY WESTON, HOWARD L. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JASON G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
